title: bus.hearth.subagent.lifecycle v1
description: Emitted by hearth-loom's claude-hooks binary (cmdNbusSubagentLifecycle) on SubagentStart and SubagentStop hook events. Lets hearth-loom's SubagentLifecycleBridge track spawned and completed subagents cross-project and wire them into the session tree. Published with NERVOUS_SOURCE=/claude-host/<project>.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the lifecycle event fired.

event.description: Lifecycle phase. subagent_started fires when a subagent session begins; subagent_stopped fires when it ends.

agent_id.description: ULID of the parent orchestrator session that spawned the subagent.

session_id.description: ULID of the parent session. For host sessions equals agent_id.

conversation_id.description: ULID of the top-level conversation context.

subagent_id.description: Session ID of the newly spawned (or stopped) subagent.

subagent_type.description: Subagent role string (e.g. 'host_subagent'). Empty when not provided by the hook.

project.description: Canonical project name the parent session is operating in.

worktree.description: Relative worktree path if the subagent runs in a git worktree (e.g. 'agent-session-mods'). Absent otherwise.

display.description: Zellij display label of the parent pane (e.g. 'tengine [agent-abc]').

cwd.description: Absolute path of the working directory when the lifecycle event fired.

pane_id_qualified.description: Zellij pane identifier in zellij:session:pane form.

transcript_path.description: Absolute path to the parent session's .jsonl transcript file.
